_comment: Pre-cutover TS reference baseline. Captured manually; Slice 5 perf gate compares Rust numbers against these. Re-run via `npm --prefix apps/web run bench` to refresh. Numbers are approximate (single dev box, no pinning); the Slice 5 gate uses a relative threshold (≤10% regression) rather than absolute timings.
captured_via: vitest bench (TS reference, libsodium-wrappers-sumo, no Comlink, no Worker)

argon2id_login.description: deriveKeys with default Argon2id profile (account unlock cold path)

regression_budget.comment: Slice 5 must compare WASM throughput against these; allow ≤10% regression on hot paths, ≤5% on Argon2id (one-shot login, lower budget).
